---
name: Data Contribution
about: Share photos, 3D scans, field recordings, or measurements
title: "[Data] "
labels: data-contribution
assignees: ''
---

## What kind of data?
<!-- Check all that apply -->
- [ ] Photography (reference photos of landmarks, materials, details)
- [ ] 3D scan (photogrammetry of statue, architecture, rock outcrop)
- [ ] Field recording (audio at a specific location)
- [ ] Measurement (dimensions, distances, heights)
- [ ] OSM mapping (furniture, paths, features I've added to OpenStreetMap)
- [ ] Other

## Location in Central Park
<!-- Be as specific as possible: landmark name, coordinates, or description -->


## Description
<!-- What did you capture? When? What conditions? -->


## Files / Links
<!-- Attach files, or link to Wikimedia Commons / Sketchfab / Freesound uploads -->


## License
<!-- Confirm you're sharing under a compatible license -->
- [ ] I release this data under CC0, CC-BY, or CC-BY-SA
- [ ] I am the original creator of this data
